languages.text: {n}Во взгляде, который Мастер Дисциплины не спускает с чужака, читается смутное узнавание — и неверие. Она неохотно кивает блюстителям, и те отступают.{/n}
{n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Во взгляде, который Мастер Дисциплины не спускает с чужака, читается смутное узнавание — и неверие. Она неохотно кивает блюстителям, и те отступают.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and disbelief. She gives the enforcers a reluctant nod, and they step back.{/n}
{n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and disbelief. She gives the enforcers a reluctant nod, and they step back.{/n}
{n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}
{n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Im auf den Fremden gerichteten Blick der Waffenmeisterin spiegeln sich Wiedererkennen und Ungläubigkeit wider. Sie nickt den Enforcern zögerlich zu, die daraufhin zurücktreten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Im auf den Fremden gerichteten Blick der Waffenmeisterin spiegeln sich Wiedererkennen und Ungläubigkeit wider. Sie nickt den Enforcern zögerlich zu, die daraufhin zurücktreten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans le regard que pose la capitaine d'armes sur l'inconnu, vous remarquez une lueur de reconnaissance et d'incrédulité. À contrecœur, elle adresse un signe de tête aux prévôts, qui reculent.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans le regard que pose la capitaine d'armes sur l'inconnu, vous remarquez une lueur de reconnaissance et d'incrédulité. À contrecœur, elle adresse un signe de tête aux prévôts, qui reculent.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En la mirada que la maestra de armas dedica al desconocido hay un destello de reconocimiento e incredulidad. Con reluctancia, hace un gesto de cabeza a los guardias, que se alejan en respuesta.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}En la mirada que la maestra de armas dedica al desconocido hay un destello de reconocimiento e incredulidad. Con reluctancia, hace un gesto de cabeza a los guardias, que se alejan en respuesta.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Silahtar'ın yabancıya diktiği bakışlarda bir tanıma ve inanamama parıltısı var. Başıyla infazcılara onay vermesi üzerine geri çekiliyorlar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Silahtar'ın yabancıya diktiği bakışlarda bir tanıma ve inanamama parıltısı var. Başıyla infazcılara onay vermesi üzerine geri çekiliyorlar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}戒律大师盯着这个陌生人，眼神中掠过一丝复杂的神采——似是相识，又满是惊愕。她不情不愿地朝执法者点头示意，他们这才向后退开。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}戒律大师盯着这个陌生人，眼神中掠过一丝复杂的神采——似是相识，又满是惊愕。她不情不愿地朝执法者点头示意，他们这才向后退开。{/n}

languages.text: {n}船長は、見知らぬ男の顔を見つめ、一瞬、認識と不信の光を放つ。渋々、船長は取り締まりの者たちに頷き、取り締まりの者は後退する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the gaze the Master-at-Arms fixes upon the stranger, there is a glimmer of recognition and of disbelief. Reluctantly, she gives the enforcers a nod, and they step back.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}船長は、見知らぬ男の顔を見つめ、一瞬、認識と不信の光を放つ。渋々、船長は取り締まりの者たちに頷き、取り締まりの者は後退する。{/n}
